name: dragons-flame
description: Self-hosted start page - Dragons Flame Fork

scripts.init-server: echo Instaling server dependencies && npm install
scripts.init-client: cd client && echo Instaling client dependencies && npm install
scripts.dir-init: npx mkdirp data public && touch public/flame.css public/customQueries.json
scripts.dev-server: nodemon --watch . --ext js,json --ignore node_modules --ignore data --ignore .git --ignore client server.js
